web.title: Query (Feature Service/Layer) | ArcGIS REST APIs - Esri Developer

web.title: Query (Feature Service) | ArcGIS REST APIs - Esri Developer
web.description: The query operation queries a feature service resource and returns either a feature set for each layer in the query, a count of features for each layer.
